title: useInbox composable should accept reactive laneId
subtitle: critical

iterations.content:
Currently `useInbox({ laneId })` captures `laneId` as a plain string at setup time. If the parent component changes `laneId` without remounting (e.g. navigating between lanes), the composable won't react.

**Option A:** Accept `MaybeRef<string>` and use `toValue()` inside a computed.
**Option B:** Use `:key="laneId"` on the component to force remount.

Option B is simpler but creates a new SSE connection each time. Option A is more elegant but adds complexity to the composable signature.

feedback.comment: Go with Option B (:key) for now — simplicity wins. We can always upgrade to reactive later if the SSE reconnection becomes a UX issue.

iterations.content:
Applied Option B as requested. Added `:key="laneId"` on `LaneInboxTab` in `LaneDetail.vue` to force remount on lane change. The composable keeps its simple `string` parameter.

```vue
<LaneInboxTab
  v-else-if="activeTab === 'inbox'"
  :key="laneId"
  :lane-id="laneId"
/>
```

SSE reconnection is near-instant in practice (< 100ms).
